fields.summary: Update clinical justification field validation — enforce minimum character count
fields.description:
The clinical justification field in the prior authorization form currently has no minimum length requirement. Implement a 200-character minimum with a live character counter to reduce incomplete submissions.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Field displays character count as user types.
2. Form validation blocks submission if justification < 200 characters.
3. Error message is actionable and specific.
